title: Labor-Market Research, Role Families, and Data Limits · Independent Career Trial
summary: A different candidate, role family, location, access need, employment history, constraint, and hiring process requires an independent transfer of labor-market research, role families, and data limits into a changed dated labor-market evidence brief. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of dated labor-market evidence brief with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Distinguish occupations, job titles, functions, industries, products, seniority, and employment arrangements when mapping possible work.
Record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data.
Interpret posting-frequency signals as bounded demand evidence rather than required-skill, hiring-probability, or future-certainty claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Occupation Vs Title
steps.instruction:
lab case — A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The lab variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Lab Occupation Vs Title.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish occupations, job titles, functions, industries, products, seniority, and employment arrangements when mapping possible work. For Commit to the mission model · Lab Occupation Vs Title, keep Occupation Vs Title connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The lab variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Occupation Vs Title condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: FTC Job Scam Consumer Alert — Controls recruiter identity verification, premature sensitive-data requests, payment and equipment-check fraud, urgency signals, and independent employer-channel confirmation.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model · Lab Role Hypothesis
steps.instruction:
Write the lab evidence note for Role Hypothesis: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The lab variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Select a small, testable role-family hypothesis from personal constraints, evidence adjacency, real tasks, and market signals.

Evidence target: Defend the transferred model · Lab Role Hypothesis.
steps.why: Retrieving Role Hypothesis through the concrete dated labor-market evidence brief case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the transferred model · Lab Role Hypothesis, keep Role Hypothesis connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Select a small, testable role-family hypothesis from personal constraints, evidence adjacency, real tasks, and market signals.

hints: For Defend the transferred model · Lab Role Hypothesis, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Role Hypothesis precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Defend the transferred model · Lab Role Hypothesis, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The lab variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Select a small, testable role-family hypothesis from personal constraints, evidence adjacency, real tasks, and market signals.

For Defend the transferred model · Lab Role Hypothesis, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Keeping every possible role open always increases opportunity.
